headings.text: If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingJVC Partners Up With Control4Posted on May 14, 2025JVC Partners Up With Control4The control system is compatible with all JVC D-ILA projector modelsResidential Systems StaffJVC Projectors, Home Theater, a division of JVCKENWOOD USA Corporation, has partnered with Control4, part of ADI | Snap One. The control system is available for home theater projectors and is compatible with all JVC D-ILA projector models.“We believe in working smarter, not harder,” said Robert Budde, National Product Manager for JVC Home Theater Projectors. “By partnering with ADI | Snap One, we are pleased to offer their Control4 product to our customers, assisting with seamless integration for all.”With Control4, you can stay connected to JVC D-ILA Home Theater Projectors by pairing the system’s home automation software. Customers can now locate Control4 home automation information on all JVC D-ILA projector product pages.For more information, visit https://www.jvc.com/usa/pro/projectors/, adiglobal.com, and snapone.com.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
